MapCompetition.name: Cafe Map Competition
MapCompetition.description: Create a cafe build in one of five styles: Modern, Vintage, Chic, Garden, or Custom. Submit a playable map or a showcase build. Each category will have three winners, with custom rewards themed to their cafe style. Entries will be judged on theme accuracy, creativity, visual design, layout, and technical skill, with optional playability scoring. Submissions are open from April 9 to April 19, so get building and make your cafe stand out. Remember to include the category name in your map title.
